hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks gemini after-agent'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks gemini after-model'

Installation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks gemini session-start'
